description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several medium-sized trees. The structure features a moderately pitched, dark gray gable roof with a central chimney. The front facade is defined by a small entryway and a symmetrical arrangement of windows, flanked by shrubbery and a paved walkway leading to the street. The property is bordered by a driveway and a sidewalk, with the house set back from the road. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, possibly stucco or painted siding, and the roof is covered with asphalt shingles. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood environment.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, symmetrical windows, and surrounded by trees and lawn, set back from a street with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway, symmetrical windows, and landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and the full length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backyard, rear facade, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with the back entrance, rear windows, and more of the surrounding lawn visible.
